items.title: Remotely Scan TouchScreen Inputs with EM
items.summary: This paper reveals and exploits a critical security vulnerability: the electromagnetic (EM) side channel of capacitive touchscreens leaks sufficient information to recover fine-grained, continuous handwriting trajectories.
